evals.prompt: Plan the next sprint for the order-platform project.
evals.expected_output: A dated sprint-plan page in wiki/projects/order-platform/delivery/sprint-{date}.md with committed specs, tasks, capacity reasoning, and carry-overs from last sprint.

evals.prompt: Run sprint planning — Monday morning kickoff.
evals.expected_output: Same as default; uses inferred project from working directory if unambiguous.

evals.prompt: Mid-sprint replan after the database migration blocker.
evals.expected_output: Replan that updates the current sprint plan rather than creating a new one; documents the blocker and reshuffled priorities.
